objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 9 evaluation harness with reusable fixtures, scenario metrics, eval tests, and a scriptable context evaluator

evaluator.command: bun run eval:context && bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when eval fixtures and tests prove deleted/stale files are rejected, payment flow includes service and webhook nodes, unresolved edge count is reported, large unrelated files are not returned in full, graph-proximate owners outrank disconnected semantic matches, and check/test/build pass

lastValidation.evidence: bun run eval:context && bun run check && bun run test && bun run build passed; eval metrics: ownerHitRate=1, flowPathCompleteness=1, unresolvedEdgeCount=3, staleHitRate=0, deletedHitRate=0, graphRerankLift=5, largeFullBodyViolations=0; vitest 14 files 41 tests passed
